_comment: Vercel rule enforcement config for rn-dev-agent. See docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-07-vercel-skills-integration-design.md and skills/rn-best-practices/SKILL.md.
_enabledCategories_doc: Either "all" or an array of category prefixes from rules.index.json (e.g., ["react-native-skills", "rn-dev-agent"]). Web-only categories like "react-best-practices" are filtered automatically by platform field.
_severityOverrides_doc: Per-rule severity override. Keys are rule IDs from rules.index.json (e.g., "react-native-skills/ui-pressable"). Values are "warn" | "error" | "off". Use sparingly — defaults are tuned per upstream's impact field.
_baselinePath_doc: Path to baseline file (relative to project root). Generate via: node <plugin>/scripts/check-vercel-rules.mjs --baseline-snapshot. Existing violations in this file are skipped on subsequent runs — only NEW violations report. Critical for retrofit on existing apps.

auditHook._enabled_doc: Set false to disable the PostToolUse audit hook for this project (still keeps /check-vercel-rules slash command working).
